name: nexob2b
description: NexoB2B — Plataforma SaaS B2B de Portales de Clientes Conectados al ERP

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.db:migrate: cd prisma && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd prisma && npx prisma db seed
